content.speakerText: I changed my hairstyle—what do you think?
content.speakerTextCn: 我换了新发型，你觉得怎么样？
expectedAnswers: I love it! It gives you such a modern, edgy look.
You look totally refreshed—this style suits you better than your old one.
Wow, that’s a bold change! But it works so well on you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚赞美并指出具体优点
语言准确性：使用恰当形容词和结构，如 'edgy look', 'suits better'
表达自然度：是否使用真实语境中的口语节奏和语气词（如 'wow', 'totally'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'change', 'style', 'suit', 'look' 等核心词汇

content.scenarioHint: 你的朋友刚剪了新发型，你注意到后主动称赞并询问他的感受
content.speakerText: I love your new haircut! It really brings out your features—how did you decide on this style?
content.speakerTextCn: 我超喜欢你的新发型！它特别凸显你的五官——你是怎么决定选这个款式的？
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I wanted something fresh but still professional. The stylist suggested it and I’m so glad I tried it.
I was hesitant at first, but now I can’t stop looking in the mirror! It just feels right.
Honestly, I was scared it’d be too bold, but everyone’s been complimenting me—so I’m loving it!
I’ve been wanting to change things up, and this was the perfect balance of bold and wearable.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚表达了赞美并自然引出对发型选择的询问
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话节奏，无生硬表达
关键词覆盖：使用了 haircut, style, decide, feel right, compliment 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你看到同事换了新发型，想表达欣赏并了解他/她是否满意这个改变
content.speakerText: Wow, your hair looks amazing! Did you go for something totally different on purpose?
content.speakerTextCn: 哇，你的头发太棒了！你是故意尝试了完全不同的风格吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I wanted to break out of my usual look—I’m actually really happy with how it turned out!
I was nervous, but my sister insisted. Turns out she was right—it’s way more me than I thought.
Totally! I’ve had the same cut for years. This one feels liberating—like a fresh start.
I wasn’t sure at first, but now I get compliments everywhere. Definitely worth the risk!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然表达欣赏并引导对方分享体验
语言准确性：使用了恰当的表达如 'break out of', 'turned out', 'liberating'
表达自然度：语气亲切，符合职场或日常朋友间的对话氛围
关键词覆盖：使用了 hair, different, purpose, happy, compliment, risk 等场景关键词
